title: Tailwind CSS in Production
subtitle: Utility-first CSS that scales — design tokens, components, and the patterns that hold up.
summary: Tailwind CSS won the styling debate by being utility-first, themeable, and ship-friendly. But scaling it past a single component takes discipline — design tokens, component patterns, dark mode, responsive design, and a configuration that doesn't fight you. This course covers Tailwind in real production: from CSS variables and themes to component libraries, animation, and performance.
